channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Street light not working, 9th March
item.description:
The street light outside 52 Turkdean Road has not been working for 4 days
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Turkdean Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain outside three springs is sunken and blocked, 9th March
item.description:
Reported previously, no action taken as yet. Pothole forming around drain and getting worse day by day. Drain collapsing and is now blocked
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Previously reported and advised by “Fixmystreet today it had been fixed …IT HAS NOT!, 9th March
Complete Failure of both Inspection and repair, 9th March
item.description:
The repair which was carried out, clearly did not cover a big enough area (I had highlighted previously that the area which was marked with white paint was not big enough ... see the crazed area well outside the repair ... AND look at the poor quality of the repair which has clearly just been pushed into a muddy puddle and is already cracked and failing !!! A senior manager needs to look at this as, if this is an example of what our council tax is being used for (and presumably will pay for another re-repair) then it's no wonder we are cash strapped! I should add that my background if Highway Maintenance with some 40 years experience in Local Government! Howard Davis, C.Eng. M.I.C.E.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stoke Road, Tewkesbury, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Long channel pothole in middle lane of roundabout, adjacent to the exit to Longlevens, 9th March
item.description:
There is a long deep pothole in the middle lane adjacent to the exit to Longlevens with gravel and grit surrounding it. It is particularly problematic for motorcyclist's such as myself as it would destabilise the bike in a turn if rode into and the grit could cause a loss of traction.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmbridge Court Roundabout, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waste by grit box, 9th March
item.description:
A bunch of different waste on side of road next to grit box
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ermine Way, Birdlip, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Series of holes all along Centre of Leckhampton Lane near Redrow estate, 9th March
item.description:
This is the Shurdington side of a repair which was carried out on the 9th of March and this causing traffic to drive dangerously in the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leckhampton Lane, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Long series of potholes along centre line of road, 9th March
item.description:
Near a junction of crickets/farm Lane and Leckhampton Lane
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leckhampton Lane, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poor repair resulting in new potholes, 9th March
item.description:
Large depression in road service and 3 new potholes, caused by shoddy repair.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Mead Road, Naunton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two “no road markings” signs left by contractors, 9th March
item.description:
Two “no road markings” signs left by contractors in Nine Elms Road, one each end of recently resurfaced section of road. Road markings were repainted over a week ago.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nine Elms Road, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Pothole in middle of road, 9th March
item.description:
Middle of the road, so traffic can’t avoid it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Mead Road, Naunton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2ft long, 3” deep pothole, 9th March
item.description:
Mead Rd, Cheltenham

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Mead Road, Naunton, Cheltenham

item.title: Pothole x 2, 9th March
item.description:
35 & 24 green gardens
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Gardens, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
